review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9: First and foremost, I want to commend Zydus Life Sciences Ltd for its exceptional reputation as a leader in the pharmaceutical industry. Zydus Life Sciences Ltd unwavering commitment to advancing healthcare through innovative solutions and groundbreaking research has inspired me greatly. I have been following Zydus closely and have been consistently impressed by the significant impact your team has made in improving patient outcomes worldwide. Zydus Life Sciences Ltd have culture of collaboration, scientific excellence, and patient-centricity aligns perfectly with my own professional values and aspirations. The emphasis placed on integrity, ethical practices, and dedication to quality in every aspect of drug development is truly commendable. I am eager to be part of an organization that shares my passion for transforming healthcare and improving lives on a global scale. Zydus Life Sciences Ltd have commitment to fostering a dynamic and inclusive work environment, promoting professional growth, and nurturing talent aligns perfectly with my own career aspirations. I am confident that working alongside the talented professionals at Zydus Life Sciences Ltd will not only enhance my skills and knowledge but also provide a platform to contribute meaningfully to the future of pharmaceutical innovation.

review-details_detailsLink__NxIv5: Zydus builds people to build its business
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9:
In my stint of nearly two years now, I have realised several things which sets the organization apart from others.

1) Motivated youth workforce: A major chunk of employees are under 35. This is not for namesake, since several perch on positions where strategic decisions are made.
2) Demanding yet extremely rewarding culture: The appraisals are largely meritocratic. Age is never an impediment for growth.
3) Growth focus both for company and employees: As a pioneer in several therapies and a lifescience powerhouse, the group has a clear focus on growth through innovation. Since the company is on a growth trajectory, the frontiers for growth are immense and open for the talent pool.
4) Best-in-industry pay and perks including good salary, mediclaim, bonus, etc.
5) Emphasis on in-house talent: In house talent is given preference over onboarding from industry. Internal portal for exploring diverse and differentiated job roles exist.
6) A well oiled system for training inhouse talent: With collaboration with IIMs and other institutions, the company offers an array of training programmes both internally and also at other organisations.
7) Apolitical and supportive workforce: The culture as such is apolitical. 
8) Fresh ideas are appreciated and learning is celebrated.
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2: Some may find their roles to be demanding initially, but this too comes with rewards.
